### Students

::: {.grid}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Jorge Blanco"
    image  = "/images/Jorge Blanco.jpg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Vadim Gorin"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Yang Chu"
    url    = "https://sites.google.com/view/yangch2"
    image  = "/images/CHU_Yang - Yang Chu.jpg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Steven Evans, Alan Hammond"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Victor Ginsburg"
    url    = "https://math.berkeley.edu/~victor/"
    image  = "/images/victor - Victor Ginsburg.jpg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Shirshendu Ganguly"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Karissa Huang"
    image  = "/images/karissa-huang.JPG"
    affil  = "Advised by: Christian Borgs, Jennifer Chayes"
>}}


{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Kaihao Jing"
    url    = "https://kaihao.org/"
    image  = "/images/kaihao-jing.jpg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Shirshendu Ganguly"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Philip LaPorte"
    url    = "https://philiplaporte.github.io"
    image  = "/images/Philip_Laporte2 - Philip LaPorte.JPG"
    affil  = "Advised by: Steven Evans"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Zoe McDonald"
    image  = "/images/zoe-mcdonald.jpeg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Steven Evans"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Daniel Raban"
    url    = "https://pillowmath.github.io/"
    image  = "/images/IMG_3615 - Daniel Cyrus Raban.jpg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Steven Evans"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Gabriel Raposo"
    url    = "https://www.stat.berkeley.edu/~raposo/"
    image  = "/images/PictureGabriel - Gabriel Raposo.jpeg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Vadim Gorin"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Vilas Winstein"
    url    = "vilas.us"
    image  = "/images/headshot - Vilas Sreenivasan Winstein.jpg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Shirshendu Ganguly"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Chris Yao"
    url    = "https://math.berkeley.edu/~chris.yao/"
    image  = "/images/Chris_Yao - Chris Yao.jpg"
    affil  = "Advised by: Steven Evans"
>}}
:::
